privileged_info_summary: The task targets four landmark academic papers: Turing's 1936 'On Computable Numbers, with an Application to the Entscheidungsproblem' (Proceedings of the London Mathematical Society, vol. s2-42, pp. 230-265), Shannon's 1948 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' (Bell System Technical Journal, vol. 27, pp. 379-423, 623-656), Vaswani et al.'s 2017 'Attention Is All You Need' (NIPS Proceedings, Dec 2017), and Silver et al.'s 2016 'Mastering the Game of Go with Deep Neural Networks and Tree Search' (Nature, vol. 529, pp. 484-489). The task includes two distractor papers to test disambiguation: Turing's 1950 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence' (Mind, vol. 59, pp. 433-460) and Shannon-Weaver's 1949 book 'The Mathematical Theory of Communication' (University of Illinois Press). All papers are real, published academic works. The collection name 'Manuscript 2024' and tag 'cited' are user-facing task parameters. The Zotero library environment is synthetic but contains instances of these real papers.
